case_title: SEARS, JEFF et al VS WALKER, JIM et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, JIM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY SEARS, JEFF SEARS, HELENA AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, JIM WEST AMERICA BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEARS, JEFF SEARS, HELENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, JIM WEST AMERICA BANK $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,955.00, DEFT. JIM WALKER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFT WEST AMERICA BANK IS SUBSTITUTED AS DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
